list.txt: - Our stay was wonderful! We were there for one night but it was amazing. Specially with such an incredible host, Vanessa.
- Fast Internet. Felt safe in the area. Staff was very helpful. There are lovely common areas both inside and out. It was a nice B&B experience.
- Fast Internet. Felt safe in the area. Staff was very helpful. There are lovely common areas both inside and out. It was a nice B&B experience.
- Our stay was wonderful! We were there for one night but it was amazing. Specially with such an incredible host, Vanessa.
- Molt bona estada en un espai amb molt d’encant i bones atencions
- Fantástico alojamiento! Muy bonito, acogedor, cómodo y trato excelente. Volveré sin duda. Muchas gracias por todo!

A true hidden gem and a must stay in Barcelona!! - Excellent property with very friendly, helpful and responsive staff. Great location and rooms were excellent. The terrace to relax and have a glass of wine was amazing. Definitely recommend and will stay here again. A true hidden gem in the heart of Barcelona. Nothing. Exceeded all expectations!!
I hope to come back again someday! We had a great time there! - The apartment was beautiful, the breakfast was nice, the location was great! Everything was great.
Un lugar soñado en Barcelona - Excelente atención y servicio El desayuno espectacular Nada

Excellent stay in a great location. Highly recommended. - Great location, comfortable room, and a nice balcony. The breakfast was excellent, and everything was clean and well maintained. I really enjoyed my stay and would happily stay here again.
Wonderful place to stay, perfect breakfast, it was only one night, but I wish I could stay longer. - The place is wonderful, high quality of design, clean and helpful staff. Stairs :)

What a gem of an B&B - -Staff was a 10 -Not too big of a B&B -Loved the 24/7 Nespresso machine, juices and honor system wines -Beautiful large room with a huge bathroom and giant towels -Wonderful breakfast Absolutely nothing
Hermoso b&b con una ubicación excelente. Muy buen desayuno y disponibilidad de snacks, agua, infusiones todo el tiem - La ubicación y el desayuno

Son derece profesyonel ve mükemmel bir tesis. - Konumu mükemmel. Diagonal metro istasyonuna çok yakın ve buradan her yere rahatlıkla ulaşabiliyorsunuz. Giriş-çıkışlar şifreyle, gayet kolay. Odalar geniş ve rahat. Tesis içerisinde ortak kullanım alanı ve teras bölümü de var. Tam otomatik makinesi dahil herşey düşünülmüş. Kahvaltı da gayet güzel ve yeterli. Çalışanlar çok güler yüzlü ve ilgililer. Herkese tekrar teşekkür ederiz. Çok çok güzel bir 3 gün geçirdik :)

A very pleasant surprise that surpassed our expectations. - The room was excellent, the bed was very comfortable, my wife loved the large tub so she could take a comfortable bath. The room was nice and the decorative ceiling was also a nice bonus. Nothing really. I was simply unfamiliar with the check out procedure.
Estadía maravillosa - La ubicación, los espacios comunes, una armonía y calidez hermosa Nada no me gustó

Como en casa. - La ubicación, el personal super atentos, el desayuno y los servicios que nos brindaros son excelentes, que lugar tan lindo y tranquilo, nos sentimos como en casa, seguro volveremos. Mil gracias !!!! Todo super bien.

Superbe terrasse, bons déjeuners et bon emplacement - La superbe terrasse disponible 24/24 Lit très confortable Déjeuner très varié Propre et paisible Du vin, disponible avec une contribution volontaire et des petits en cas pour les fringales Il est très agréable au retour des visites de se relaxer sur la belle grande terrasse Oui nous pouvons fumer sur la terrasse extérieur Envie d’un petit café à 22h aucun problème ! La cafetière est toujours disponible sans frais Notre chambre etait petite mais ultra confortable Pas besoin de prendre avec la mini terrasse avec la chambre car avec la terrasse de l’hôtel vraiment pas nécessaire L’eau de la douche est toujours chaude Un épicerie juste en face Le métro a deux pas Des restos/ terrasses à deux pas de l’hôtel nous avons tout fait à pied Bref, tout est parfait Allez y sans hésiter! Pour un séjour de 4 jours, changement de serviettes serait apprécié
Très bon séjour - Le calme la gentillesse du personnel L accueil de qualité et la propreté du lieu et le petit déjeuner

Fantastic B&B in Barcelona that did not disappoint! - The Staff are Ca La Maria were so helpful and permitted an early check in on request and were excellent with their communication in both spanish and english. The room, bed and facilities were lovely and the breakfast outstanding with great quality and variety. The location is excellent and everywhere that we wanted to see was walkable. I rate the B&B an easy 10/10! Nothing - it is a very cool B&B in Barcelona!

Som at bo i egen lejlighed på en af de bedste adresse i Barcelona. - Stedet har en hjemlig og imødekommende stemning. Dejligt fælles opholdsrum med fri kaffe, te, frugt og sødt hele dagen. Personalet er meget venligt. Beliggenheden er i top. Dejlig terrasse, hvor man kan nyde fuglefløjt og ro midt i storbyen.

Maravillosa estancia - Todo en general, pero destacando la profesionalidad, atención,simpatía de Vanesa,que es la persona que nos recepcionó cuando llegamos.Un personal de esa valía hace que la estancia en una ciudad sea mucho mejor.Gracias Vanesa. Todo me gustó.

- Tutto!!!! Ci è piaciuto tutto. Grazie a tutto lo staff... abbiamo avuto un problemino che hanno risolto tempestivamente e ci hanno regalato anche una bottiglia di vino per scusarsi dell'inconveniente. Grazie grazie ancora. Struttura bellssima , colazione stratosferica e personale top!! Niente

Un alojamiento de 10 - Excelente ubicación, alojamiento precioso y trato muy amable. La habitación era muy bonita, muy cómoda para 3 personas con una habitación arriba. El desayuno delicioso y la terraza espectacular. Nada

Definitely would recommend - Wonderful location, B&B is located in a lovely neighbourhood, very close to the city centre, walking distance from all the attractions. A vintage room with a huge bed, a spacious bathroom (great bath too!) and a big terrace on the roof. Tasty, varied breakfast and kind staff. Very easy check in process.
Perfect location, all clean, good staff. - Everything
Outstanding!!! - Excelente ubicación y hermoso hotel, la administradora super pendiente, estuvimos muy cómodos, volveremos a este sitio completamente por más tiempo Todo excelente!
- Very spacious room and bathroom. Great location and kind lady at reception. Also terrace is amazing and it was very clean. 5 stars
- Fabulous! Exceptional terrace to use. Great attitude.
Thuis in Barcelona - Echt een thuisgevoel , kleinschalig, prachtige kamer met hoge plafond, fantastisch terras. Wifi was niet altijd snel
Magnífic. Hi tornaré - Està molt ben situat. Es un hotel petit amb molt d’encant. El personal és molt agradable
Неймовірний готель,з привітним персоналом,тераса це щось неймовірне,с вами смачні снідати,та великий плюс що можна каву - Затишно дуже,автентично

Fabulous stay in Barcelona! - Gorgeous property, convenient to many areas and bus/metro stops. The rear terrace and garden are amazing …a lovely spot for breakfast or afternoon tea. Staff was so friendly and accommodating - they held our luggage on our last day and welcomed us back in the afternoon for coffee and relaxing before we had to leave for our train.

Great cosy and picturesque bed and breakfast at a great location - Very cosy room in a great part of town (close to all points of interesting without being too touristic). The staff was very friendly and helpful. They gave us pointers for dining, all (we tried) were excellent. Coffee, tea and water are available all day as were some local desserts. The ceiling in th rooms was probably six meter high with artwork. Heavy wooden doors and the elevator (if you need it for he 1st floor) was rustic. Overall it was a great experience, and we are planning to come back! -
- Tudo absolutamente perfeito
- Burda kalın, tavsiye ederim. Degisik bir deneyim. Giris cok kolaydi, gec giris yaptik fakat hersey onceden bilgi verilmis idi. Etrafa restaurantlar, konum cok iyi .metro hemen yaninda.

- Me pareció un lugar increíble, donde puedes descansar, super conodo, limpio, el desayuno fue bueno , la ubicación excelente, su personal todo el tiempo fueron muy atentos. Sinceramente lo recomiendo ampliamente 🤗
Wonderful stay, charming and comfortable interiors. - Loved that there were drinks, snacks and fruit out all day. The terrace was gorgeous! It was all great

Excellent experience with a beautiful room, wonderful location, and sincerely helpful and kind staff. - Large elegant rooms with beautiful design touches. Extremely helpful staff ! Nice breakfast and coffee access. Interesting art that may not suit all travelers. However, we did not mind it.

- Kahvaltısı, otelin sakinliği , konumu , odaları her şey mükemmeldi oda dar değildi ve kendine ait balkonu vardı otelde sınırsız kahve , çay , su ve atıştırmalık vardı. Bidaha Barcelonaya gelsem yine burda kalmayı tercih ederdim
B&B très chaleureux et convivial l’endroit est très bien situé (métro, restaurant, 30 minutes de l’aéroport, 15 minu - Très bien situé propre et convivial Rien

Csodálatos kis hotel. - Központi helyen, mégis csendes. Kis hotel kevés szobával, így nyugalmas volt. Csodálatos nagy terasz tele virággal. Hatalmas kényelmes ágy, nagy fürdőszoba óriási káddal, külön zuhanyzóval. Kedves személyzet. Jó reggeli, nagy választékkal. A közelben bolt, rengeteg étterem, kávézó található a metró és a buszmegálló is nagyon közel van. A repülőtéri buszmegálló sincs messze. Rengeteg látványosság gyalogosan is hamar elérhető. Nem volt ilyen.
- Άριστη διαμονή. Η συνολική εμπειρία ήταν υψηλού επιπέδου. Η τηλεόραση ήταν εκτός λειτουργίας αλλά σε καμία περίπτωση δεν επηρέασε την συνολική εμπειρία άριστης διαμονής
- Bello Niente
Ca La Maria is exceptional. We really enjoyed our stay here. - Everything! The balcony, the sitting room, the deco, the breakfast, the snacks... The hosts are really thoughful and frirendly.
Lugar acogedor en el corazón de la ciudad - Espacio

Decepcionante - La ubicación Lo ofertado no se corresponde con lo publicitado

Good location & breakfast but building is old and hot water, ac & wifi were not working. - Great location, good breakfast. Building is old, no hot water two days, wifi was out the day we arrived, ac was broken for 3 days.

Matig, zou hier niet weer heen gaan en zeker niet voor die prijs. - Bedden waren goed Kleine kamers, veel lawaai zaten bij de ontbijtruimte, ook geen tv. Ontbijt stelt niet veel voor, en elke dag hetzelfde. Buitendeur gaat met code open en die deed het niet waardoor wij ‘s nachts op straat stonden. Na vele telefoontjes toch nog binnengekomen.
- There are no comments available for this review
- There are no comments available for this review
Enjoyable - Location and hospitality Small bedroom
- 朝の出発が早く朝食の時間外でしたが対応してもらえた。 エアコンが付いていたが全く効かず室内がとても暑かった。 シャワーのお湯が足りないのか1人入ると2人目後半から水になる。 一応張り紙で知らせてはいるが、続けて入れないので人数が多いと困る。

Prima verblijf met enkele aandachtspunten. - De B&B zit in een authentiek pand en ook de kamers en ruimtes zijn authentiek, dat is leuk. De douche is prima Ook kan je in de avond een drankje pakken en wat hiervoor in een spaarvarken doen, prima! Koffie is goed! Het ontbijt is summier en iedere dag wat afgepast, als je laat bent eet je de restjes. Ontbijt was iets van een handige huisvrouw, niet professioneel.

- Mooi pand op een centrale locatie. Kleinschalig Ontbijt is goed voor een korte citytrip. Steeds hetzelfde. Brood uit de diepvries die moest getoast worden. Nooit eens croissants, wit brood of stokbrood.
- There are no comments available for this review
- -le confort de la chambre -l'emplacement de l'hôtel -la beauté et l décoration de l'établissement

Lovely retreat in the heart of Barcelona! - This B&B was lovely! The rooms were very comfortable and the facility was very relaxing. The breakfast room and living areas were inviting and the outdoor patio was a nice retreat when the weather permitted. The staff is extremely attentive and while I encountered a few minor hiccups, they were resolved quickly with great attention. I highly recommend this place for the traveler that likes their privacy and doesn't need lots of attention. The location is perfect and safe and I will definitely return when I come back to Barcelona!

Espectacular - La estancia en Ca la Maria, fue genial, la habitación grande, acogedora y limpia. El baño espectacular. Y la cama super cómoda. El desayuno muy correcto, no faltaba nada. El único pero, la olor fuerte a producto de limpieza.... tuvimos que abrir un poco para ventilar...

Nette Unterkunft mit wunderbarer Terrasse - Wir hatten ein sehr schönes, sehr großes Zimmer mit direktem Zugang zur Terrasse. Das Badezimmer war außergewöhnlich groß mit freistehende Badewanne. Die große Dachterrasse ist wirklich eine Oase in Barcelona. die Menschen sehr freundlich. Gute Lage für Casa Battlo und Park Guell. Nicht ganz so nah zur Altstadt.

- Das Hotel ist klein und wunderschön. Die Terrasse ist mit so viel Liebe gestaltet, der Frühstücksraum sehr gemütlich und einladend. Die Suit war sehr geräumig und schön und stilvoll eingerichtet. Perfekt für eine 4köpfige Familie. Die Lage fanden wir ebenfalls super. Zu Fuß zur Sagrada Familia waren es knappe 30 Minuten, die U-Bahn ist aber auch gleich um die Ecke. Die Mitarbeiter sind super nett. Gerne jeder Zeit wieder. Das Frühstück könnte ein wenig mehr Auswahl bieten, ist jedoch trotzdem gut.
- Quarto confortável, silencioso e um bom café da manhã
Heel fijn en gastvrij! - Ruime balkon, ontbijt en de gastvrijheid
- Room was big, outdoor patio was nice Shower door didn’t close
Magnifique séjour - Emplacement idéal Personnel chaleureux et accueillant Chambre agréable Petit déjeuner copieux Je recommande vivement
Recommended in lieu of a hotel - Lovely terrace and location. Cozy.
- Nice, friendly staff. Intresting stylish interior! Super terrace! A bit old renovation
- familiar, muy bonito limpio buen desayuno.. genial volveré
- Hotel très bien placé, petit dejeuner buffet très complet, personnel très sympa, grande chambre Peu d'isolation du bruit dans les chambres
- Location is fantastic! The property itself is beautiful. The rooms are light and spacious. It’s a small hotel so it feels cosy/friendly.
Great stay - Beautiful apartment, very convenient, great location. The room is pretty good Room size and location. Breakfast is great too

Parfait pour profiter de quelques jours à Barcelone - La gentillesse de tout le personnel que nous avons croisé. Superbe petit-déjuner et terasse très appreciée. Emplacement proche du metro et l'accés pratique jour et nuit.

- La literie est bonne. Impossible d’ouvrir les fenêtres car elles donnent sur les poubelles de tri

Great stay - Beautiful apartment, very convenient, great location. The room is pretty good Room size and location. Breakfast is great too
- -le confort de la chambre -l'emplacement de l'hôtel -la beauté et l décoration de l'établissement
- Location is fantastic! The property itself is beautiful. The rooms are light and spacious. It’s a small hotel so it feels cosy/friendly.
- Mega tolle Terrasse auf der man entspannt Frühstücken kann und auch zwischendurch mal eine Pause einlegen oder den Abend ausklingen lassen kann.
- Excelente lugar, muy céntrico, el personal muy amable. Todo perfecto

- Perfect location for a few-day trip - close to all major sightseeing places. We appreciated a lot the warm welcome, very kind and customer-focused. Room was great - clean and comfortable. Breakfast was tasty. I would recommend adjusting the amount of breakfast to the number of customers.
Magnifique séjour - Emplacement idéal Personnel chaleureux et accueillant Chambre agréable Petit déjeuner copieux Je recommande vivement
Recommended in lieu of a hotel - Lovely terrace and location. Cozy.

Great relaxing place to stay. You feel at Home. - Excellent, small B&B. Wonderful staff, they were very helpful in every way. The breakfast was exceptional, and the cozy environment made for an unforgettable stay. nothing really.
- Room was big, outdoor patio was nice Shower door didn’t close

Nette Unterkunft mit wunderbarer Terrasse - Wir hatten ein sehr schönes, sehr großes Zimmer mit direktem Zugang zur Terrasse. Das Badezimmer war außergewöhnlich groß mit freistehende Badewanne. Die große Dachterrasse ist wirklich eine Oase in Barcelona. die Menschen sehr freundlich. Gute Lage für Casa Battlo und Park Guell. Nicht ganz so nah zur Altstadt.

- Quarto confortável, silencioso e um bom café da manhã

Lovely retreat in the heart of Barcelona! - This B&B was lovely! The rooms were very comfortable and the facility was very relaxing. The breakfast room and living areas were inviting and the outdoor patio was a nice retreat when the weather permitted. The staff is extremely attentive and while I encountered a few minor hiccups, they were resolved quickly with great attention. I highly recommend this place for the traveler that likes their privacy and doesn't need lots of attention. - Das Hotel ist klein und wunderschön. Die Terrasse ist mit so viel Liebe gestaltet, der Frühstücksraum sehr gemütlich und einladend. Die Suit war sehr geräumig und schön und stilvoll eingerichtet. Perfekt für eine 4köpfige Familie. Die Lage fanden wir ebenfalls super. Zu Fuß zur Sagrada Familia waren es knappe 30 Minuten, die U-Bahn ist aber auch gleich um die Ecke. Die Mitarbeiter sind super nett. Gerne jeder Zeit wieder. Das Frühstück könnte ein wenig mehr Auswahl bieten, ist jedoch trotzdem gut.
- Nice, friendly staff. Intresting stylish interior! Super terrace! A bit old renovation
Heel fijn en gastvrij! - Ruime balkon, ontbijt en de gastvrijheid

Mooie en perfecte accommodatie voor een city-trip. - Personeel, vriendelijk, goede uitleg, goede ontvangst. Ontbijt was niet zeer uitgebreid, maar MEER dan voldoende. Wat locatie betreft, perfect om met de auto te bereiken, en perfect, althans voor ons als wandelaars,,om alle bezienswaardigheden te voet te doen. Onze kamer was net naast de muur waar het ontbijtbuffet stond. Op moment men dat begon klaar te zetten, was dat dan ook goed hoorbaar, en werd je eigenlijk beetje te vroeg wakker gemaakt aangezien ontbijt voorzien was vanaf 8:30 uur. Misschien eenvoudig op te lossen met geluiddemping tegen de muur te plaatsen.
Céntrico, y silencioso para descansar - La ubicación y el personal
Property is in a great location great restaurants within walking distance - Very cozy great garden, and fabulous location Property was very good, but need some updating new furniture paint
Out of the ordinary accommodation option in up market area of Barcelona. - Breakfast and outdoor deck area was lovely Location was great Room was bit dark

Wir waren zufrieden! - Originelle kleine Unterkunft in perfekter Lage! Das Highlight ist sicherlich die Hinterhofterrasse! Absolut ruhig gelegen! Die Unterkunft in einem alten Gebäude mit einem Aufzug aus der Jahrhundertwende war nicht nur sehr sauber und perfekt gelegen, sondern auch im Stil einfach originell! Preis ist „Barcelona like“, aber für die zentrale Lage akzeptabel. Frühstücksangebot noch ausbaufähig.

Хорошо - Отличное месторасположение в центре города, в очень уютном месте В целом атмосфера и интерьер отличные, не понравился скудный и однообразный завтрак, за такую стоимость хотелось бы стол чуть разнообразней
Heel fijn verblijf gehad - De ruimte, het personeel, ontbijt en het terras. De begeleiding qua inchecken Kleine zaken: douche deur die niet sluit, toilet rol houder die loszit.
Agradable la zona del living Muy bueno el desayuno, lástima la habitación tan oscura - La ubicación, el personal ,el desayuno La habitación muy oscura. Todo el día con luz artificial
Super - Excellente situation. Petit déjeuner satisfaisant Pas de fenêtre sur extérieur. Salle de bain très exiguë.

- Super nettes Personal, sauber, sehr gute Lage, ruhig und familiär! Gutes Frühstück! Leider war das Zimmer sehr beengend und dunkel, keine Fenster zum öffnen, nur ein Lichtschacht! Alles ein bißchen in die Jahre gekommen! Aber trotzdem hatte es einen besonderen Flair!
- Les chambres La quantité du petit déjeuner
- Un joli lieu facilement accessible. Un petit déjeuner complet. Un accueil chaleureux. L’isolation de l’immeuble n’est pas optimale.

- Läget var bra och lugnt. Sviten var toppen för en familj med två ungdomar. Nära shopping och bra restauranger. Mysigt med terrassen på innergården. Trevlig frukostbuffé men personalen var dåliga på att uppmärksamma att saker behövde fyllas på. Vi fick säga till flera gånger. Lite lyhört.

Atendeu o necessário - A cama e os lençóis eram de boa qualidade. O café da manhã tinha pouca variedade, mas era de boa qualidade. Da limpeza, deixou muito a desejar. Vários móveis com pó e o box da ducha bem sujo. O papel higiênico era áspero, baixa qualidade.
- Las instalaciones
- we arrived after 4 when reception was closed but such an easy check in, lovely vibe an decoration , beautiful rooms. -
Muy recomendable - En general todo muy bien No pude ver la TV, no tenía señal, me lo justificaron que estaban de obras.
Soddisfazione e accoglienza - accogliente e carina, adatta per un soggiorno di tre ragazze ☺️ i cuscini erano leggermente scomodi
- Не зачиняється туалет.

eventos.name: Feast of Saint James the Apostle
